cards.Raw Text:

Characters: 人 骗

cards.Chinese: 我们生活在最新的时代。
cards.English: We live in the newest era.
cards.Raw Text:
我们生活在最新的时代。
用法 1 - age, era, epoch, period (in one's life) (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/时 代

cards.Chinese: 时代在变，我们的想法也在变。
cards.English: Times are changing, and our ideas are changing too.
cards.Raw Text:
时代在变，我们的想法也在变。
用法 1 - age, era, epoch, period (in one's life) (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/时 代

cards.Chinese: 他刚从北美洲回到中国，要倒一下时差。
cards.English: He just returned to China from North America and needs to adjust to the time difference.
cards.Raw Text:
他刚从北美洲回到中国，要倒一下时差。
用法 1 - time difference, time lag
Characters: 时 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/差

cards.Chinese: 北美洲和南美洲没有时差。
cards.English: There's no time difference between North and South America.
cards.Raw Text:
北美洲和南美洲没有时差。
用法 1 - time difference, time lag
Characters: 时 差

cards.Chinese: 时差让他大晚上还睡不着觉。
cards.English: The jet lag keeps him awake late at night.
cards.Raw Text:
时差让他大晚上还睡不着觉。
用法 2 - jet lag
Characters: 时 差

cards.Chinese: 东边和西边有三个小时的时差。
cards.English: There's a three-hour time difference between east and west.
cards.Raw Text:
东边和西边有三个小时的时差。
用法 2 - jet lag
Characters: 时 差

cards.Chinese: 特别时期，就别去外面吃饭了。
cards.English: During special periods, don't go out to eat.
cards.Raw Text:
特别时期，就别去外面吃饭了。
用法 1 - period, phase (MW: 个)
Characters: 时 期

cards.Chinese: 孩子正在长身体的时期，一定要吃好，运动好。
cards.English: During the period when children are growing, they must eat well and exercise well.
cards.Raw Text:
孩子正在长身体的时期，一定要吃好，运动好。
用法 1 - period, phase (MW: 个)
Characters: 时 期

cards.Chinese: 这学期的中文课非常有意思。
cards.English: This semester's Chinese class is very interesting.
cards.Raw Text:
这学期的中文课非常有意思。
用法 1 - school term, term, semester
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/学 期

cards.Chinese: 没想到这个学期的音乐课很难。
cards.English: I didn't expect this semester's music class to be so hard.
cards.Raw Text:
没想到这个学期的音乐课很难。
用法 1 - school term, term, semester
Characters: 学 期

cards.Chinese: 因为他长期看手机，所以他的头很痛。
cards.English: Because he looks at his phone for long periods, his head hurts a lot.
cards.Raw Text:
因为他长期看手机，所以他的头很痛。
用法 1 - long term, long time, long range (of a forecast)
Characters: 期 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/长

cards.Chinese: 我长期运动，现在我比以前美了很多。
cards.English: I've exercised long-term, and now I'm much more beautiful than before.
cards.Raw Text:
我长期运动，现在我比以前美了很多。
用法 1 - long term, long time, long range (of a forecast)
Characters: 期 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/长

cards.Chinese: 我刚开始学中文，短期内我还不会写汉字。
cards.English: I just started learning Chinese; in the short term, I still can't write Chinese characters.
cards.Raw Text:
我刚开始学中文，短期内我还不会写汉字。
用法 1 - short term, short-term
Characters: 期 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/短

cards.Chinese: 这个病短期内不会好。
cards.English: This illness won't get better in the short term.
cards.Raw Text:
这个病短期内不会好。
用法 1 - short term, short-term
Characters: 期 短

cards.Chinese: 妈妈定期去医院看望奶奶。
cards.English: Mom regularly goes to the hospital to visit grandma.
cards.Raw Text:
妈妈定期去医院看望奶奶。
用法 1 - at set dates, at regular intervals, periodic
Characters: 定 期

cards.Chinese: 孩子出生后的前三年要定期去医院。
cards.English: In the first three years after a child is born, they need regular hospital visits.
cards.Raw Text:
孩子出生后的前三年要定期去医院。
用法 1 - at set dates, at regular intervals, periodic
Characters: 定 期

cards.Chinese: 我喜欢看一本叫做《小小说》的定期书本。
cards.English: I like reading a regular publication called 'Little Short Stories'.
cards.Raw Text:
我喜欢看一本叫做《小小说》的定期书本。
用法 2 - limited to a fixed period of time, fixed term
Characters: 定 期

cards.Chinese: 你一个月会收到一次我们做好的定期运动计划。
cards.English: Every month you'll receive a copy of our regular exercise plan.
cards.Raw Text:
你一个月会收到一次我们做好的定期运动计划。
用法 2 - limited to a fixed period of time, fixed term
Characters: 定 期

cards.Chinese: 你们要好好工作，近期公司老板要来。
cards.English: You all need to work hard; recently the company boss is coming.
cards.Raw Text:
你们要好好工作，近期公司老板要来。
用法 1 - near in time, in the near future, very soon, recent
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/近 期

cards.Chinese: 近期猪肉卖得不贵，你可以多买一点。
cards.English: Recently pork isn't selling expensive; you can buy a bit more.
cards.Raw Text:
近期猪肉卖得不贵，你可以多买一点。
用法 1 - near in time, in the near future, very soon, recent
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/近 期

cards.Chinese: 休息日期间，很多医生还是要上班。
cards.English: During the rest days, many doctors still have to work.
cards.Raw Text:
休息日期间，很多医生还是要上班。
用法 1 - period of time, time, time period, period (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/间 期

cards.Chinese: 旅游期间，他的手机不会开机。
cards.English: During the trip, his phone won't be turned on.
cards.Raw Text:
旅游期间，他的手机不会开机。
用法 1 - period of time, time, time period, period (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/间 期

cards.Chinese: 银行卡过期了可以再办。
cards.English: If your bank card expires, you can get a new one.
cards.Raw Text:
银行卡过期了可以再办。
用法 1 - to be overdue, to exceed the time limit
Characters: 过 期

cards.Chinese: 你这张电影票已经过期了。
cards.English: This movie ticket of yours has already expired.
cards.Raw Text:
你这张电影票已经过期了。
用法 1 - to be overdue, to exceed the time limit
Characters: 过 期

cards.Chinese: 太快来的好运气就像过期水果一样，要吃下去才会知道。
cards.English: Good luck that comes too fast is like expired fruit; you'll only know after eating it.
cards.Raw Text:
太快来的好运气就像过期水果一样，要吃下去才会知道。
用法 2 - to expire (as in expiration date)
Characters: 过 期

cards.Chinese: 最好在东西过期之前把它吃完。
cards.English: It's best to finish food before it expires.
cards.Raw Text:
最好在东西过期之前把它吃完。
用法 2 - to expire (as in expiration date)
Characters: 过 期

cards.Chinese: 7月14日，对他来说是一个幸运的日期。
cards.English: July 14th is a lucky date for him.
cards.Raw Text:
7月14日，对他来说是一个幸运的日期。
用法 1 - date (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/日 期

cards.Chinese: 一起活动的日期到现在还没有决定。
cards.English: The date for the activity together still hasn't been decided.
cards.Raw Text:
一起活动的日期到现在还没有决定。
用法 1 - date (MW: 个)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/日 期

cards.Chinese: 你按一按这个地方，门就会打开了。
cards.English: Press this spot and the door will open.
cards.Raw Text:
你按一按这个地方，门就会打开了。
Characters: 按

cards.Chinese: 我按下心里的不开心，还是耐心地和他说话。
cards.English: I suppressed the unhappiness in my heart and still patiently talked with him.
cards.Raw Text:
我按下心里的不开心，还是耐心地和他说话。
耐心 nàixīn - patient, patience
Characters: 按

cards.Chinese: 按你的说法，公司给你的钱偏少了。
cards.English: According to what you say, the money the company gave you is a bit on the low side.
cards.Raw Text:
按你的说法，公司给你的钱偏少了。
Characters: 按

cards.Chinese: 按照计划，这座楼十二月就能完工。
cards.English: According to the plan, this building will be completed in December.
cards.Raw Text:
按照计划，这座楼十二月就能完工。
Characters: 按 照

cards.Chinese: 他总是按时起床，按时学习，因此他的成绩很不错。
cards.English: He always gets up on time and studies on time, therefore his grades are quite good.
cards.Raw Text:
他总是按时起床，按时学习，因此他的成绩很不错。
成绩 chéngjì - grades
Characters: 按 时

cards.Chinese: 我们公司今年招十个员工。
cards.English: Our company is hiring ten employees this year.
cards.Raw Text:
我们公司今年招十个员工。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/招

cards.Chinese: 这个孩子眼睛大大的，真招人喜欢。
cards.English: This child has big eyes; he's really likable.
cards.Raw Text:
这个孩子眼睛大大的，真招人喜欢。
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/招

cards.Chinese: 你知道今年咱们学校招生了多少人吗？
cards.English: Do you know how many students our school recruited this year?
cards.Raw Text:
你知道今年咱们学校招生了多少人吗？
咱们 zánmen - us (including person being spoken to)
Characters: 招

cards.Chinese: 这个房子每月四百元，水电费包括在内。
cards.English: This house is four hundred yuan per month, utilities included.
cards.Raw Text:
这个房子每月四百元，水电费包括在内。
费 fèi - fee
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/包 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/括

cards.Chinese: 日常生活中，他用得最多的是自行车。
cards.English: In daily life, what he uses most is his bicycle.
cards.Raw Text:
日常生活中，他用得最多的是自行车。
用法 1 - daily, everyday
Characters: 日 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/常

cards.Chinese: 妈妈去超市买了一些日常用品。
cards.English: Mom went to the supermarket to buy some daily necessities.
cards.Raw Text:
妈妈去超市买了一些日常用品。
用法 1 - daily, everyday
Characters: 日 常

cards.Chinese: 吃完饭以后不要跑步，这是一个常识。
cards.English: Don't run after eating; this is common knowledge.
cards.Raw Text:
吃完饭以后不要跑步，这是一个常识。
用法 1 - common sense, general knowledge MW: 门 mén
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/识 常

cards.Chinese: 你知道中国的金木水火土这个五行常识吗？
cards.English: Do you know the common knowledge about China's five elements: metal, wood, water, fire, and earth?
cards.Raw Text:
你知道中国的金木水火土这个五行常识吗？
用法 1 - common sense, general knowledge MW: 门 mén
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/识 常

cards.Chinese: 小孩子生病是一件很常见的事情，不要担心。
cards.English: Children getting sick is a very common thing; don't worry.
cards.Raw Text:
小孩子生病是一件很常见的事情，不要担心。
用法 1 - commonly seen, common, to see sth frequently
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/见 常

cards.Chinese: 一边走路，一边看手机变得很常见了。
cards.English: Walking while looking at your phone has become very common.
cards.Raw Text:
一边走路，一边看手机变得很常见了。
用法 1 - commonly seen, common, to see sth frequently
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/见 常

cards.Chinese: 常用的东西就放在经常可以拿到的地方吧。
cards.English: Put commonly used things in places you can often reach.
cards.Raw Text:
常用的东西就放在经常可以拿到的地方吧。
用法 1 - in common usage
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/用 常

cards.Chinese: 这台电动车我不常用，送给你吧。
cards.English: I don't use this electric bike often; I'll give it to you.
cards.Raw Text:
这台电动车我不常用，送给你吧。
用法 1 - in common usage
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/用 常

cards.Chinese: 往往很多事和我们想的不一样。
cards.English: Often, many things are not as we imagine.
cards.Raw Text:
往往很多事和我们想的不一样。
用法 1 - often, frequently
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/往

cards.Chinese: 我往往会自己一个人坐着想事情。
cards.English: I often sit alone thinking about things.
cards.Raw Text:
我往往会自己一个人坐着想事情。
用法 1 - often, frequently
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/往

cards.Chinese: 今天下大雨，但是同学们还是照常到学校上课。
cards.English: It's raining heavily today, but the students still went to school as usual.
cards.Raw Text:
今天下大雨，但是同学们还是照常到学校上课。
用法 1 - as usual
Characters: 照 常

cards.Chinese: 停电了，学校没法照常上课。
cards.English: There's a power outage; the school can't hold classes as usual.
cards.Raw Text:
停电了，学校没法照常上课。
用法 1 - as usual
Characters: 照 常

cards.Chinese: 开公司需要办营业执照。
cards.English: Opening a company requires a business license.
cards.Raw Text:
开公司需要办营业执照。
用法 1 - license, permit
Characters: 照 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/执

cards.Chinese: 没有开车的执照是不能开车的。
cards.English: Without a driver's license, you can't drive.
cards.Raw Text:
没有开车的执照是不能开车的。
用法 1 - license, permit
Characters: 照 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/执

cards.Chinese: 难道他们不是在约会吗？
cards.English: Aren't they on a date?
cards.Raw Text:
难道他们不是在约会吗？
用法 1 - giving force to a rhetorical question (adv)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/难 https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/道

cards.Chinese: 他怎么还没有来，难道出什么事了？
cards.English: Why hasn't he come yet; could something have happened?
cards.Raw Text:
他怎么还没有来，难道出什么事了？
用法 1 - giving force to a rhetorical question (adv)
Characters: https://traverse.link/Mandarin_Blueprint/难

cards.Chinese: 我当然会用筷子吃饭，难道你不知道我是中国人吗？
cards.English: Of course I know how to eat with chopsticks; don't you know I'm Chinese?
cards.Raw Text:
我当然会用筷子吃饭，难道你不知道我是中国人吗？
用法 1 - giving force to a rhetorical question (adv)
Characters: 难

cards.Chinese: 我当然知道要坐飞机，难道我要走路去上海？
cards.English: Of course I know to take a plane; do you think I'd walk to Shanghai?
cards.Raw Text:
我当然知道要坐飞机，难道我要走路去上海？
用法 1 - giving force to a rhetorical question (adv)
Characters: 难
